home.title: My Plants
home.emptyBody: Add your first plant. I’ll help identify it, understand how it’s doing, and remind you when it needs care.
settings.title: Settings
addPlant.title: Add a plant
addPlant.message: The full add-plant flow will live here soon.
addPlant.analysisLong: Analysis can take up to a minute — everything is working
addPlant.analysisFailed: I couldn’t analyze this plant right now. You can still add it manually.
plantDetail.title: Plant details
plantDetail.placeholder: The complete plant detail screen will be added later.
plantDetail.editPlaceholder: Plant editing will be added later.
plantDetail.deleteBody: Its photos and care history will also be deleted.
checkSoil.title: How does the soil feel?
checkSoil.wait: No watering yet. We’ll check again in 2 days.
checkSoil.wet: The soil is still very wet. Avoid watering for now.
checkSoil.wetWarning: If it stays wet for a long time, check drainage and airflow.
checkSoil.unsure: Try checking the top 3–4 cm of soil with your finger.
photo.title: Add a new photo
photo.message: Photo analysis will be added later.
photos.title: Photos
photos.coverHelper: This photo is shown on the Home screen.
photos.analyzeIssue: Would you like me to analyse this issue?
photos.fileError:
This image could not be added.
Please choose a JPG, PNG, HEIC or WebP image under 10 MB.
photos.partialAdded: {added} photos added. {rejected} file could not be used.
photos.deleteBody: It will be removed from this plant.
photos.onlyPhotoError: A plant must have at least one photo.
edit.title: Edit plant
edit.notesPlaceholder:
Bought at IKEA.
Moved away from the window.
Repotted into a larger pot.
story.noFutureDate: Choose today or an earlier date.

milestones.recovered.title: Feeling better 💚

plants.afterWatering.message: All set for now. We’ll check in again soon.
plants.new.message: Settling in nicely. Add a few more photos when you can.
plants.martha.message: She’s absolutely thriving right now. Check back in 4 days.
plants.ollie.message: Ollie could use some water. Check whether the topsoil is dry.
plants.franklin.message: Franklin’s leaves look a little stressed. Moving him away from the window might help.
plants.luna.message: Luna is loving her spot by the window. She’s been looking happy lately.
plants.luna.checkMessage: Luna looks happy, but her soil could use a quick check today.
milestones.new.plant_added.description: Your new plant joined the family.
